title: Rival Gaming: The Free WeMod Alternative PC Gamers Should Know About
content:
If you have been paying for WeMod, PLITCH, or CheatHappens to use game trainers on PC, there is a free alternative that deserves more attention: Rival Gaming.

Rival Gaming (rivalgaming.com) is a free game trainer platform for PC gamers. Their core product is the RG Trainer, a downloadable desktop app that connects to your installed games and lets you activate cheats with a single click. No command-line work required. The platform currently supports over 60 PC games.

Supported games include Cyberpunk 2077, Elden Ring, Baldurs Gate 3, Diablo 4, Black Myth Wukong, Fallout 4, Stardew Valley, Monster Hunter World, and more than 50 additional titles. Trainers are kept updated when games receive patches.

Compared to alternatives: Rival Gaming is completely free with no feature gating. WeMod uses a freemium model pushing users toward a paid subscription for full access. PLITCH and CheatHappens both require paid subscriptions. Rival Gaming gives every registered user access to the full trainer library at no cost.

Beyond the trainer app, Rival Gaming includes community forums, game request voting, interactive game maps, leaderboards, achievements, and public changelogs so you know when trainers have been updated.

Game trainers are for single-player use only. Using them in online or multiplayer modes violates virtually every game terms of service and can result in permanent bans. Rival Gaming is designed for offline single-player experiences.

Rival Gaming is worth checking out if you are frustrated with WeMod moving features behind a paywall, if you are paying for PLITCH or CheatHappens and want a free option, or if you want trainer software with regular updates and community support.

Download the RG Trainer app and browse the full game library at rivalgaming.com.
